flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at GateWay Community College rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($7.9k → $9.0k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at GateWay Community College rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($2.1k → $2.4k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at GateWay Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.4% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at GateWay Community College rose 47% between 2023 and 2024 (19.6% → 28.8%).
